comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list of Shopify collection paths). Migrated from scraper_trueshot.py inline COLLECTION_HANDLES on 2026-06-14. The inline literal stored BARE collection handles (e.g. 'ammunition-pistol-ammo-9mm'); per the blackbasin precedent (Jon's call, 2026-06-14) the config stores the full '/collections/<handle>' path instead, and the scraper appends '/products.json?...' at runtime — keeping the schema's leading-slash path invariant and one consistent Shopify convention across blackbasin/trueshot/freedommunitions. Parity-proven byte-identical (fetched URL) before flip via _probe_caliber_paths_parity.py with the /collections/ inline prefix. REQUESTS-BASED scraper (Shopify per-collection /products.json feed via urllib — no browser), so it does NOT use the shared Playwright redirect / report_empty_first_pages guards; it keeps its own inline EMPTY_FAIL_THRESHOLD storefront-drift guard. The scraper keys off RETAILER_ID=15 (no slug lookup). .223 and 5.56 live in two separate collections, both bucket to 223-556; seen_ids dedups overlap. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
